_doc: Mocked public-safe BPMN operate pause then resume of one instance.

rules.match: maestro bpmn instance pause inst-run-003 -f folder-public
maestro bpmn instance pause inst-run-003 --folder-key folder-public
maestro bpmn instance resume inst-run-003 -f folder-public
maestro bpmn instance resume inst-run-003 --folder-key folder-public
